data.body: Note: This behavior (skipping preplanning approval gate for MODERATE+HIGH routing) likely occurred after a context compaction event. The brainstorm session covered 3 epics sequentially, and by the time the routing decision was made for dso-qo0x, the detailed scenario analysis and research findings had likely been compacted. Post-compaction, the orchestrator may have had insufficient context to properly evaluate the routing decision and defaulted to the simpler path. Related: c2ac-a305 (misclassification bug).
